Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The problem requires a DuckDB SQL query for process mining on an event log

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: WITH case_variants AS SELECT case_id list_agg activity ORDER BY timestamp AS variant_sequence FROM event_log GROUP BY case_id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: variant_counts AS SELECT variant_sequence COUNT AS case_count FROM case_variants GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: top_variants AS SELECT variant_sequence FROM variant_counts LIMIT K

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: top_case_ids AS SELECT case_id FROM case_variants WHERE variant_sequence IN SELECT variant_sequence FROM top_variants

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: SELECT el FROM event_log el JOIN top_case_ids tci ON el case_id equals tci case_id ORDER BY el case_id el timestamp

Name: Validation - IND
Text: Replace K with the desired number of top variants e g 5 in the LIMIT clause of variant_counts CTE
